scripts.format: bun landing:format && bun db:format && bun app:format && bun cli:format
scripts.landing:format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write packages/landing && cd packages/landing && gleam format && cd ../.. && bun run scripts/gleam_format.ts
scripts.dash:format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write packages/dash && cd packages/dash && gleam format && cd ../.. && bun run scripts/gleam_format.ts
scripts.app:format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write packages/app && cd packages/app && gleam format && cd ../.. && bun run scripts/gleam_format.ts
scripts.api:format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write packages/api && cd packages/api && gleam format && cd ../.. && bun run scripts/gleam_format.ts
scripts.cli:format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write packages/cli && cd packages/cli && gleam format && cd ../.. && bun run scripts/gleam_format.ts
